svg.text: a BatchManifest describes pad assignments. ppak-load-manifest writes a populated .ppak.

g.text: 7 samples · top-level bpm + per-sample overrides · suggested pad placement
"bpm" at top = track default. per-sample "bpm" overrides per pad.
"time_mode": "bpm" = device stretches the sample to the project tempo on play.
samples land on suggested pads · stretch tag set when time_mode=bpm
sample fills the next free pad in declaration order — useful for quick drops.
